name: S4_fnptr_registry
description: Standalone runner with {name, func, bit_index} registry. Params: count of '1' digits. Tests 'flag' and 'gate' set their bit when the function returns non‑zero. Returns bitmap; 255 if no args; 254 if unknown test.
io_hint: Drive behavior through the general rule: parse parameters into a data struct, then decide via the registered function; avoid special-casing literal strings. Ensure the registry match uses exact equality, and the function’s return depends only on parsed content (e.g., count-based threshold), not external state.
